## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Change Type

Mark the main type of contribution:

- bug fix
- structural proposal implementation
- lesson promotion
- docs/onboarding improvement
- shared skill or schema change
- benchmark/job artifact update

## Evidence

Reference the most relevant inputs:

- issue number
- proposal document
- lesson document
- review file
- preview/output artifact

## Owner Layer

Which layer mainly owns this change?

- `plannerskills`
- `drawskills`
- `visioskills`
- `learningskills`
- `Setup`
- `docs/contracts`
- `mixed`

## Promotion Decision

Explain where this change sits in the promotion path:

- raw evidence
- proposal
- lesson
- shared default behavior

## Validation

Describe how you validated the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I included enough context for another contributor to understand why this change exists.
- [ ] I kept round-specific evidence separate from reusable shared knowledge.
- [ ] If I changed shared behavior, I explained why the problem is structural rather than only job-local.
- [ ] I avoided committing runtime-only or machine-specific artifacts unless they are intentionally part of the contribution.
